items.name_cn:
Original leather
【Premium Hardware, Original Leather】Wander Matelasse Suede Hobo Handbag/Shoulder Bag~20cm Heather Suede
The Wander handbag has become a classic accessory. This mini bag is crafted from Matalasse suede, featuring exquisite craftsmanship and a three-dimensional effect that exudes elegance. With a Hobo silhouette, it blends vintage charm with modern elegance, becoming a new symbol of a modern woman's temperament.
~Gold hardware
~Zipper closure
~Front metal-engraved logo
~Cotton satin lining
Dimensions: W20×H17×D6cm

items.name_en: Original leather 5BG291, New arrival vintage tote bag, made with new soft lambskin leather, soft and premium texture. Inspired by Miu's archival design, this Aventure Nappa leather bag has a restructured, lighter form with a fresh personality. Features embossed letter logo, vintage gold hardware, linen blend lining, zip pocket and patch pocket. Long handle suitable for hand or shoulder carry. Dimensions: 31X40X13CM

items.name_en: Original leather with counter gift box 5BB117: Miu Miu New Patchwork Briefcase, heavy handmade, made of multiple leather splices. The bold innovative design perfectly interprets Miu's unique attitude of unconstrained, casual, and inclusive lifestyle. This bag is cool, capturing a refined multifunctional design that blends men's and women's elements. Casual and lazy, natural and free-spirited, full of personality. Super large capacity and lightweight. New canvas lining, popular globally, loved by fashion bloggers and celebrities. Size: 34X23X12cm (with original packaging)

items.name_en: Original Miu Miu corduroy tote is so dreamy!! So cute
items.name_cn:
Original Miu Miu corduroy tote is so dreamy!! So cute
5BB117: New Miu Miu corduroy tote, a perfect fusion of fashion and classic, exquisite and casual, corduroy fabric paired with calfskin, soft and durable texture, lighter and more versatile than full leather, stunning in both appearance and practicality, three-generation long handle design for shoulder carrying, large size with ample capacity to easily hold various essentials, perfect for work or travel, new canvas lining for a more beautiful and durable look, Dimensions: 34X23X12cm (with original packaging🎁)

specs.rawTitle:
